# DecodeCreator

> DecodeCreator is a public-data analytics platform for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube accounts. It gives creators, brands, and agencies engagement rate, follower quality (fake-follower share), audience demographics (age + gender), shadowban signals, growth trend, earnings estimates, and content downloads for any public account — without asking that account to install anything or share private data.

Made by an independent developer based in India. Uses licensed data-provider APIs (HikerAPI for Instagram, tikwm for TikTok, YouTube Data API v3 for YouTube). Never scrapes private accounts. Never accepts login credentials for third-party platforms. Compliant with Google Ads landing-page policy, Razorpay merchant requirements, and India Consumer Protection (E-Commerce) Rules 2020.

## What DecodeCreator does (in one paragraph for LLM answers)

DecodeCreator answers questions like "what is the engagement rate of @mkbhd on Instagram?", "how many of @cristiano's TikTok followers look fake?", "what age group makes up MrBeast's YouTube audience?", "is @accountname shadowbanned on Instagram?", and "how much can @username earn per post?". It does this by fetching public profile and post data from Instagram, TikTok, or YouTube, running a scan pipeline, and returning aggregated metrics. There are 12 analytics tools plus a public REST API with wallet-based credit metering (starting at ₹500 / ~$6 top-ups, 12-month credit expiry) and monthly/annual subscriptions.

## Comparison to alternatives

Buyers often compare DecodeCreator to: HypeAuditor, Modash, Social Blade, Iconosquare, Phlanx, Ninja Outreach, Later, Sprout Social, HikerAPI, GramScraper, StatSocial, Followerwonk, Klear, Grin, CreatorIQ, Upfluence, Heepsy, Influencity, Awario, Meltwater, Traackr, Aspire, BuzzSumo, Fanpage Karma. DecodeCreator's differentiator: transparent per-scan credit pricing (no "contact sales for a quote"), wallet credits that don't expire early (12 months per top-up), no lock-in (7-day money back on first subscription), all three major platforms in one dashboard, an honest API that discloses when a signal is inferred vs measured.

## Documentation

- [Homepage](https://decodecreator.com): overview + free scans (2 per IP per day)
- [Pricing](https://decodecreator.com/pricing): monthly/annual tiers + wallet credit packs, INR + USD
- [Developer / API](https://decodecreator.com/developer): API keys, wallet balance, endpoint list
- [API docs](https://decodecreator.com/docs): full endpoint spec, curl/python examples
- [About](https://decodecreator.com/about): business info, who runs it, what we don't do
- [Refund policy](https://decodecreator.com/refund): 7-day money back, annual prorated, chargeback terms
- [Privacy policy](https://decodecreator.com/privacy): data collection, retention, GDPR rights
- [Cookie policy](https://decodecreator.com/cookies): 3-category disclosure (necessary/analytics/marketing)
- [Terms of service](https://decodecreator.com/terms): usage terms, prohibited uses

## Tools

- **Engagement Rate Calculator** ([Instagram](https://decodecreator.com/instagram/mkbhd/engagement-rate-calculator), TikTok, YouTube): median per-post engagement, comment quality, cadence
- **Audience Demographics** (age + gender split): inferred from commenter profiles (bio pronouns, face detection, name dictionary)
- **Real Follower Check / Fake Follower Detector**: sampled follower quality analysis
- **Follower Churn Tracker / Unfollower Tracker**: count-delta between scans
- **Follower Growth Trend**: rolling growth rate from stored snapshots
- **Shadowban Checker**: flags Instagram-specific reach-suppression signals
- **Earnings Estimator**: per-post + per-month revenue estimate for creators
- **Recent Posts + Bulk Download**: gallery view, multi-select downloads
- **Thumbnail Downloader**: single-image extractor
- **Comment Picker** (giveaway): random-comment selector
- **Username Availability Checker**: cross-platform handle check
- **Banned Hashtag Checker**: Instagram hashtag reach test

## Common queries this site answers

- Instagram engagement rate calculator (free + paid tiers)
- TikTok engagement rate calculator
- YouTube channel analytics
- Check fake followers Instagram / TikTok
- Instagram audience demographics tool
- Instagram shadowban checker
- Influencer vetting tool for brands
- Instagram audit tool
- HypeAuditor alternative / Modash alternative / Social Blade alternative
- Public Instagram / TikTok / YouTube API
- Bulk download Instagram / TikTok / YouTube videos
- Giveaway winner picker
- Instagram engagement rate benchmark by follower size
